title: WildFly Transaction Manager Rollback Rate
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder; Splunk Add-on for JMX (`Splunk_TA_jmx`); file monitoring for `jboss:server`, structured audit for `wildfly:audit`
spl:
index=web sourcetype="jboss:server"
| regex _raw="(?i)(Transaction.*rolled back|Marking transaction.*rollbackOnly|javax.transaction.RollbackException)"
| bin _time span=5m
| stats count by host, _time
| where count > 50
description: High rollback rates point to conflicting resources, timeouts, or downstream failures. Volume-based alerting finds systemic issues before single-ticket noise.
value: Preserves data integrity SLAs for transactional workloads.
implementation: Tune regex per WildFly version; exclude known integration-test hosts. Correlate with database outages.
visualization: Time series for pool/queue metrics, top stats for failures, event timeline for deploys.
grandmaExplanation: We quantify transaction rollbacks that hurt data consistency and user workflows.
